name: APPLIED INDUSTRIAL TECH
address: 924 SE WILSON UNIT D, BEND, OR 97702

fr.recommendations: Implementing clear signage and markings in the vehicle parking area could enhance emergency responder navigation and access. Ensuring the landscaped areas near structures are well-trimmed and do not obstruct visibility or movement paths may facilitate prompt responder operations and support effective staging. Evaluating the roof system for structural prominence may help in directing aerial operations or ground personnel during emergency responses. Maintaining clearly delineated access routes around the main building and vehicle parking area would assist emergency responders in locating entry points quickly. Overall, optimizing these elements may enhance emergency responder access and staging, contributing to more efficient and effective response capabilities on the property.

wildfire.recommendations: Enhancing defensible space and reducing wildfire exposure on your property can be achieved by focusing on key areas identified in the observations. Increasing the separation of vegetation adjacent to the structure by pruning lower branches or selectively thinning trees could help minimize the potential for fire spread. Scattered trees can be managed to reduce fuel continuity through periodic trimming and maintaining clearance between tree canopies. Attention to the vegetated perimeter is also important; consider thinning and mowing to remove dense undergrowth and dead material, while preserving a reduced vegetation density to act as a more effective buffer. These actions can support suppression efforts and improve long-term wildfire resilience, helping to protect your property from potential wildfire threats.
